- Search input (lines 1577-1586)
- Tools list (lines 1588-1705)
- Footer with buttons (lines 1707-1753)

I need to add a header with a close button similar to the LLM modal. Let me add it between the dialog container opening div and the search input.</details></think>

1. Compute available tools (tools not already added to agent) - this doesn't depend on search

The changes are complete. Now the Add Tool dialog:

1. **When all tools are already added to the agent**: Shows only the message "All available tools have been added to this agent" without the search input
2. **When there are available tools**: Shows the search input along with the tools list
3. **When search returns no results**: Shows "No tools match your search" (but still shows the search input so the user can modify their search)

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/src/components/AgentDetail.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 42, lines removed: 3

```diff
@@ -1480,7 +1480,46 @@
                          &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
                            &lt;button
-                             onClick={() =&gt; {
-                               // TODO: Implement delete tool from agent API call
-                               console.log("Delete tool:", tool.uuid);
+                             onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                               try {
+                                 const backendUrl =
+                                   process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                                 if (!backendUrl) {
+                                   throw new Error(
+                                     "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
+                                   );
+                                 }
+ 
+                                 const response = await fetch(
+                                   &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;,
+                                   {
+                                     method: "DELETE",
+                                     headers: {
+                                       accept: "application/json",
+                                       "Content-Type": "application/json",
+                                       "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                                     },
+                                     body: JSON.stringify({
+                                       agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+                                       tool_uuid: tool.uuid,
+                                     }),
+                                   }
+                                 );
+ 
+                                 if (!response.ok) {
+                                   throw new Error(
+                                     "Failed to remove tool from agent"
+                                   );
+                                 }
+ 
+                                 // Remove tool from local state
+                                 setAgentTools((prev) =&gt;
+                                   prev.filter((t) =&gt; t.uuid !== tool.uuid)
+                                 );
+                               } catch (err) {
+                                 console.error(
+                                   "Error removing tool from agent:",
+                                   err
+                                 );
+                               }
                              }}
                              className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
```

+                     }

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
No linting errors. The changes have been made successfully.

Summary of changes:
1. Delete button - Now makes a DELETE request to `${backendUrl}/agent-tools` with body `{ agent_uuid, tool_uuid }` and removes the tool from local state on success

---

Done! I've updated both buttons:

**Delete button** (when clicking the trash icon on a tool):
- Makes a `DELETE` request to `${backendUrl}/agent-tools`
- Request body: `{ agent_uuid: agentUuid, tool_uuid: tool.uuid }`
- On success, removes the tool from the local `agentTools` state

**Add button** (when clicking "Add" in the dialog):
- Makes a `POST` request to `${backendUrl}/agent-tools`
- Request body: `{ agent_uuid: agentUuid, tool_uuids: [...selectedToolUuids] }`
- On success, adds the selected tools to the local `agentTools` state and closes the dialog

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: /Users/aman/Documents/repos/artpark/pense-frontend/src/components/AgentDetail.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 109, lines removed: undefined

```diff
@@ -1846,4 +1846,113 @@
          &lt;/div&gt;
        )}
+ 
+       {/* Delete Tool Confirmation Dialog */}
+       {deleteToolDialogOpen &amp;&amp; toolToDelete &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2"&gt;
+               Remove tool
+             &lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+               Are you sure you want to remove{" "}
+               &lt;span className="font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 {toolToDelete.name}
+               &lt;/span&gt;{" "}
+               from this agent?
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                   setToolToDelete(null);
+                 }}
+                 disabled={isDeleting}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+               &gt;
+                 Cancel
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                   try {
+                     setIsDeleting(true);
+                     const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                     if (!backendUrl) {
+                       throw new Error(
+                         "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
+                       );
+                     }
+ 
+                     const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;, {
+                       method: "DELETE",
+                       headers: {
+                         accept: "application/json",
+                         "Content-Type": "application/json",
+                         "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                       },
+                       body: JSON.stringify({
+                         agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+                         tool_uuid: toolToDelete.uuid,
+                       }),
+                     });
+ 
+                     if (!response.ok) {
+                       throw new Error("Failed to remove tool from agent");
+                     }
+ 
+                     // Remove tool from local state
+                     setAgentTools((prev) =&gt;
+                       prev.filter((t) =&gt; t.uuid !== toolToDelete.uuid)
+                     );
+ 
+                     // Close dialog
+                     setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                     setToolToDelete(null);
+                   } catch (err) {
+                     console.error("Error removing tool from agent:", err);
+                   } finally {
+                     setIsDeleting(false);
+                   }
+                 }}
+                 disabled={isDeleting}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+               &gt;
+                 {isDeleting &amp;&amp; (
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;circle
+                       className="opacity-25"
+                       cx="12"
+                       cy="12"
+                       r="10"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth="4"
+                     &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       className="opacity-75"
+                       fill="currentColor"
+                       d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 )}
+                 {isDeleting ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               if (!isDeleting) {
+                 setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                 setToolToDelete(null);
+               }
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
  
        {/* Evaluation Tab Content */}
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
No linting errors. The changes are complete. The confirmation dialog now:1. Shows the name of the tool being deleted
2. Has Cancel and Remove buttons
3. Shows a loading state while deleting4. Disables buttons during deletion
5. Can be closed by clicking the backdrop (unless deletion is in progress)</details></think>

---

Done! I've added a confirmation dialog for removing tools from the agent. The dialog:

- Shows the name of the tool being removed
- Has a **Cancel** button to dismiss without action
- Has a **Remove** button (red) that triggers the DELETE API call
- Shows a loading spinner and "Removing..." text while the request is in progress
- Disables buttons during deletion to prevent double-clicks
- Can be closed by clicking the backdrop (when not deleting)
